normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU2_success_index_and_value (arr : Arr) (target : Int) (hs : Sorted arr) (i : Nat) :
  binarySearch arr target = some i → i < arr.length ∧ arr.get? i = some target
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Under sortedness, if the search returns Some i, then i is in bounds and the slice value at i equals the target.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU3_failure_absent (arr : Arr) (target : Int)
  (hs : Sorted arr) (h : binarySearch arr target = none) :
  ∀ j, j < arr.length → arr.get? j ≠ some target
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Under sortedness, if the search returns None, then the target does not occur at any valid index.
